name: product-blueprint
description: Guided pre-development product blueprint workflow for turning ideas into research-backed PRDs, stable service manifests, fully wired clickable prototypes, product-level frontend/backend operation contracts, deterministic readiness reports, production-grade visual systems, and traceable engineering handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Guided product planning before technical design: asks for decisions, records assumptions, and moves through research, PRD, screen flows, design gates, and handoff.
interface.longDescription: Product Blueprint provides independent pre-development product-planning skills for founders and agents: guided intake, decision logging, visual decision dashboards, reference research, ideation, reference deconstruction, parallel concepting, PRD writing, screen contracts, product-experience mechanism design, storyboard visualization, art direction, anti-slop visual quality review, backend systems briefing, production design-system briefing, React design-system workbench creation, high-fidelity screen specimen creation, prototype testing, structured design critique, feasibility review, and engineering handoff. Technical architecture is an optional follow-up, not the default workflow.
defaultPrompt: Guide me from idea to a fully wired product blueprint: PRD, service manifest, clickable whole-service prototype, deterministic readiness gates, design critique, and traceable engineering handoff. Ask only when a product decision is genuinely needed.
